prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次为 2928→3161→6878→3784→2939，2023 年因试卷难度变化出现异常大幅后移，2024 年回弹至 3784，2025 年进一步回升至 2939，近两年呈明显前移趋势；2025 年基准约 2939 名；该校在河南省理科（含物理类）招生计划：2021 年 337 人、2022 年 356 人、2023 年 339 人、2024 年 291 人、2025 年 380 人；2026 年物理类计划 399 人、医学类计划 77 人（医学类选科要求为物理+化学，归入理科组），合计 476 人，较 2025 年扩招约 25.3%，大幅增加招生名额，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2021–2024 年均为第 8 名，2025–2026 年位列第 9 名，稳居全国前十，综合实力顶尖；2026 年声誉评价为偏正面，食堂条件全国领先、新闻传播学科排名靠前，整体形象积极；抖音热度排名第 22（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有 A+ 学科 3 个（机械工程、光学工程、电气工程），A 学科 5 个（计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程、动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、管理科学与工程），A- 学科 9 个（临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、化学、基础医学、工商管理、新闻传播学、物理学、生物学、生物医学工程），A- 及以上共 17 个，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心工科专业均为高热推荐，社会报考热度持续走高；河 南省 2025 年物理类考生；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，与河南接壤，属邻省高校，河南考生报考湖北高校具有天然 地域偏好优势；该校在河南招生占比从 2021 年的约 1.3% 升至 2025 年的约 16.4%，省内认可度持续提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2939、2026 年大幅扩招约 25.3% 对位次的后移作用、以及河南省物理类考生增加约 32% 对竞争的加剧作用，供需两端均呈扩张态势，净竞争略有加剧；同时学校声誉正面、优势学科突出、核心工科专业热度高，对高分考生吸引力不减。预测 2026 年最低位次约 3405 名，区间 2979–3791 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for science (including physics category) are 2928→3161→6878→3784→2939 respectively. In 2023, due to changes in exam difficulty, there was an abnormal large backward shift, rebounding to 3784 in 2024, and further recovering to 2939 in 2025, showing a clear forward trend in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2939. The university's enrollment plan for science (including physics category) in Henan Province: 337 in 2021, 356 in 2022, 339 in 2023, 291 in 2024, 380 in 2025; the 2026 physics category plan is 399, medical category plan is 77 (medical category subject requirements are physics + chemistry, grouped into science), totaling 476, an increase of about 25.3% compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment slots, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 8th in the Shanghai Ranking of Chinese Universities from 2021 to 2024, and 9th in 2025–2026, consistently among the top ten nationally with top-tier comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, with nationally leading cafeteria conditions and a high ranking in journalism and communication, overall positive image; Douyin popularity ranking 22 (relatively hot), short video exposure at an upper-middle level, high application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; has 3 A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 5 A disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering), 9 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Biology, Biomedical Engineering), totaling 17 A- and above, strong disciplinary strength, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, with social application popularity continuing to rise; Henan Province 2025 physics category candidates; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Henan, a neighboring province university, giving Henan candidates a natural geographical preference advantage; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan increased from about 1.3% in 2021 to about 16.4% in 2025, with continuously improving provincial recognition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2939, the backward shift effect of the 2026 significant enrollment expansion of about 25.3%, and the intensifying competition due to the increase of about 32% in Henan physics category candidates, both supply and demand are expanding, with net competition slightly intensifying; at the same time, the university's positive reputation, outstanding advantageous disciplines, and high popularity of core engineering majors maintain strong attraction for high-scoring candidates. Predict the 2026 minimum ranking to be approximately 3405, with a range of 2979–3791.

Candidates with rankings better than 3000 can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like the Qiming Experimental Class; those around 3400 should mainly choose Tier 2 popular engineering majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, and Automation Class; those with rankings on the lower side (3700+) can consider Tier 3 majors like Energy and Power Class and Materials Class as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were 896→946→927→1661→1240, with a significant drop to 1661 in 2024 and a rebound to 1240 in 2025, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend in the past two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1240th place. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (including history category) in Henan Province: 42 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 50 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan is 45, a reduction of 5 (-10%) compared to 2025, indicating a decrease in enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 8th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2024, and 9th in 2025-2026, consistently in the national top 10, with top-tier comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, with nationally leading cafeteria conditions and an overall positive image; Douyin popularity ranking 22nd (relatively popular), with moderate to high application attention; no obvious records of enrollment gaps; advantageous liberal arts disciplines include Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A-, Chinese Language and Literature (not individually rated but strong), Sociology (not individually rated), etc. Although known for engineering and medicine, liberal arts disciplines also have A- level support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, showing significant divergence in liberal arts major popularity; Henan Province's 2025 history category examinees are approximately 352,000, and the 2026 estimate based on a history category proportion of about 39% is approximately 466,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with a substantial growth in examinee numbers and intensified competition; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, bordering Henan, making it a neighboring province university, giving Henan examinees a natural regional preference advantage when applying to Hubei universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1240, the forward-moving effect of a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensified competition), and the further intensification of competition due to an approximately 32% increase in Henan Province's history category examinees, both supply and demand sides point to intensified competition; at the same time, the university's reputation is positive, its level is top-tier, and although liberal arts majors are divergent, overall attractiveness remains undiminished. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1186, with a range of 1044–1328.

Those with rankings better than 1100 can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature; those around 1186 should primarily consider Tier 2 majors like Business Administration and Sociology; those with rankings on the lower side (1250+) can consider Tier 3 majors such as Architecture as safety options.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中科技大学在河南省医学类近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年2447名（计划34人），2022年2844名（计划35人），2023年6311名（计划38人），2024年3784名（计划32人 ），2025年27239名（计划86人）。2025年位次大幅下降主要源于医学类招生计划从32人猛增至86人（扩招168.75%），导致竞争显著缓解。2026年计划缩减至77人，较2025年减少 约10.5%，缩招将推动位次回升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家'985工程'和'211工程'重点建设高校，入选'双一流'建设高校。其同济医学院是国内顶尖医学院校之一，拥有多家实力雄厚的附 属医院，在临床医学、基础医学等领域具有突出学科优势，对河南考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。华中科技大学同济医学院位于武汉，地处中部地区核心城市，交通便利，对河南省考生具 有天然的地缘优势。2026年医学类招生77人，虽较2025年有所缩减，但整体招生规模仍处于历史较高水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，2026年华中科技大学在河南省医学类最低录取位次预计为25329名，波动区间24848至25810名。受招生计划缩减影响，位次较2025年有所回升 （更难进），但考虑到2025年扩招带来的位次大幅下移，2026年位次不会完全回到2024年水平。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Henan Province for medical subjects have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 2021: 2447 (plan: 34), 2022: 2844 (plan: 35), 2023: 6311 (plan: 38), 2024: 3784 (plan: 32), 2025: 27239 (plan: 86). The sharp decline in 2025 rankings is mainly due to a surge in medical enrollment from 32 to 86 (an increase of 168.75%), leading to significantly reduced competition. The 2026 plan is reduced to 77, a decrease of about 10.5% from 2025, and the reduction will push rankings upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with several strong affiliated hospitals, and has outstanding disciplinary advantages in clinical medicine, basic medicine, etc., exerting strong appeal to Henan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Huazhong University of Science and Technology Tongji Medical College is located in Wuhan, a core city in the central region, with convenient transportation, offering natural geographical advantages to Henan candidates. In 2026, medical enrollment is 77, although reduced from 2025, the overall enrollment scale remains at a historically high level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Henan Province for medical subjects in 2026 is predicted to be 25329, with a fluctuation range of 24848 to 25810. Affected by the reduction in enrollment plan, the ranking will rebound compared to 2025 (harder to enter), but considering the significant downward shift in rankings due to the 2025 expansion, the 2026 ranking will not fully return to the 2024 level.

Clinical medicine is the most competitive, while nursing has a relatively lower admission ranking and can be a safe choice.
